steps.title: Count total cubes and favorable outcomes
steps.content: Total number of cubes: $7 + 4 + 33 + 33 = 77$. The cubes that are neither blue nor yellow are the red and white cubes: $7 + 4 = 11$ cubes.

steps.title: Calculate probability and simplify
steps.content:
Set up the probability fraction using favorable outcomes over total outcomes:
$$P = \frac{11}{77}$$
Simplify by dividing both numerator and denominator by 11:
$$P = \frac{1}{7}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
